name: Spaghetti Con Salsa Di Gamberi e Basilico (Shrimp & Basil)
recipeIngredient: 1/2 cup boiling water, from spaghetti pot
recipeInstructions:
1. While bringing a large pot of salted water to a boil, peel, devein, and halve the shrimp crosswise.
2. Add spaghetti to the boiling water; stir occasionally.
3. Meanwhile, in a large pan, heat 4 tablespoons of olive oil. Stir in garlic and shallots, and sauté until the shallots are translucent.
4. Add cherry pepper and shrimp, taking care not to crowd them so they don't steam in their own juices. Sauté for two minutes.
5. Add wine, salt, and pepper to taste, and boil for one minute.
6. Remove shrimp with a slotted spoon; set aside.
7. Add the remaining 2 tablespoons olive oil, basil, parsley, mint, and boiling water. Bring to a vigorous boil for five minutes.
8. Reduce heat, and return shrimp to the pan for a few seconds.
9. Pour three-quarters of the sauce into another pan. Drain spaghetti and stir into the pan, tossing over medium heat until well mixed with the sauce and pasta.
10. Serve immediately, spooning remaining sauce on top.
